use_cases: FAQ sections where users can expand to see answers
Product detail pages with expandable shipping and return info
Settings panels with collapsible configuration sections
FAQ pages for customer support information
ai_summary: A collapsible accordion component built with Base UI that organizes content into expandable sections. Features a clean, minimalist design with smooth expand/collapse interactions. Perfect for FAQ pages, product information sections, and settings panels where content needs to be organized in a space-efficient manner.
